items.scenario: You signed up for a weekend pottery-and-glaze workshop run through the city arts studio. The confirmation email lists the wrong date, and the supply fee seems higher than the amount advertised on the studio's flyer.
items.direction: Write an email to the workshop coordinator. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the errors in your confirmation email
Ask which date and fee are correct
Request a corrected confirmation before the workshop
items.subject: Wrong date and supply fee on my workshop confirmation

items.scenario: You are a second-year student hoping to switch into the smaller morning section of an introductory statistics course. The morning section fits better with your part-time job, and you have already covered the first unit on your own.
items.direction: Write an email to your course instructor. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain why you want to change sections
Describe the schedule conflict you are facing
Ask how to complete the transfer
items.subject: Request to move into the morning statistics section

items.scenario: You borrowed a friend's road bike for a cycling trip last weekend. When you returned it, you noticed the rear brake had started slipping, and you want to make things right before they ride it again.
items.direction: Write an email to your friend. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain what happened to the brake
Offer to pay for the repair
Suggest a time to drop the bike at the shop together
items.subject: Something about your bike's rear brake

items.scenario: You recently bought a monthly streaming-and-audiobook subscription that promised offline downloads. The downloads keep disappearing after a day, and you were charged twice for the same month on your card statement.
items.direction: Write an email to the subscription support manager. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the two problems you have run into
Ask for a refund of the duplicate charge
Request help fixing the offline downloads
items.subject: Disappearing downloads and a double charge this month
